center.name: 洛坎普頓
center.summary: 洛坎普頓是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Rose robin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rose robin occurs in eastern and southeastern Australia, from Rockhampton east of the Great Dividing Range through eastern New South Wales and Victoria into southeastern South Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rose robin occurs in eastern and southeastern Australia, from Rockhampton east of the Great Dividing Range through eastern New South Wales and Victoria into southeastern South Australia
